metadata.name: Contoso Field Operations
metadata.description: Mobile-first app for field technicians, delivery drivers, and warehouse workers. Provides store-specific performance data, inventory alerts, and equipment health status optimized for on-the-go access.

landing_page.description: My Store view is the default landing page, showing the user's assigned store data.

audience.description: Frontline workers who need quick, mobile-optimized access to operational data for their assigned store or route.

security_groups.members_description: Field technicians responsible for store equipment maintenance
Delivery drivers for store replenishment routes
Distribution center and warehouse floor staff
Field operations team leads who manage and update the app

update_policy.description: Field workers always get the latest version. Updates are validated by field ops leads before publishing.

mobile_optimization.description: All report pages include mobile-optimized layouts designed for phone screens (portrait orientation). Visuals are stacked vertically with touch-friendly filters.

offline_access.description: Key reports are cached on the mobile device for offline access in areas with poor connectivity (warehouses, delivery routes, remote stores).

sections.name: My Store
sections.description: Store-specific performance data filtered by the logged-in user's assigned store via RLS.

items.description: Today's sales, transaction count, top products, and comparison to yesterday / last week. Auto-filtered to your assigned store.
items.rls_filter: Automatically filtered by the user's store assignment in Entra ID. Store Managers see their store; warehouse workers see their distribution center.

items.description: Track your store's daily goals: revenue target, customer count, and basket size vs. targets.

sections.name: Inventory
sections.description: Stock levels, reorder alerts, and replenishment status.

items.description: Products below reorder point at your location, with severity indicators and estimated days to stockout. Tap a product to see reorder status.
items.rls_filter: Filtered to user's assigned store or warehouse

items.description: Printable reorder report for submission to purchasing. Lists all items below reorder point with suggested order quantities.

sections.name: IoT Status
sections.description: Equipment health monitoring for assigned store locations.

items.description: Real-time status of HVAC, refrigeration, POS terminals, and security systems for your store. Shows alerts for equipment requiring attention.

row_level_security.description: All data is filtered to the user's assigned store or distribution center. Assignment is managed via Entra ID custom attributes mapped to store_id in the semantic model.
